title: Research Anomaly
description: Anomaly entry logged when a research cycle produces F, U, or C outcomes

cycle_id.description: Research cycle that produced this anomaly

production_path.description: Grammar production path that led to the anomaly

failure_mode.description: How the hypothesis failed — narrative explanation

domain_context.description: Domain tags for clustering (e.g., jazz-harmony, modal-theory)

severity.description: Severity of the anomaly (0.0 = trivial, 1.0 = paradigm-breaking)

cluster_id.description: Cluster assignment from ix anomaly clustering (null until Tier 2 analysis)

paradigm_state.description: Current paradigm state assessment for this anomaly's domain
